name: Dokploy PaaS
description: Self-hosted Platform as a Service (alternative to Vercel/Netlify). Includes Docker, Docker Swarm, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Traefik. Deploys apps from Git with auto-SSL.

commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates gnupg
apt-get update && apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin
post_create.notes: Dokploy UI available at http://CONTAINER_IP:3000. Create admin account on first visit.
